ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "ORD-400", message: error.description default "Bad request", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "ORD-404", message: error.description default "Resource not found", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "ORD-405", message: "Method not allowed", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "AUTH-401", message: "Unauthorized", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "SYS-503", message: "Downstream service unavailable", details: if (Mule::p('env') == 'dev') error.description else null, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "ORD-422", message: "Request could not be processed due to a transformation error", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "ORD-415", message: "Unsupported media type or unacceptable response format", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "SYS-500", message: "Internal server error", details: if (Mule::p('env') == 'dev') error.description else null, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
